title: ATLAS: Unauthorized ML Inference API Access (AML.T0040)
description: Detects unauthorized or rejected access to LLM/ML inference application endpoints using only SOC Application Logs fields. Filters inference routes returning auth/authorization failures (401, 403) or rate-limit rejections (429) and ranks the offending Client IP + Service Name. Repeated rejected inference calls indicate credential probing or unauthorized model use. MITRE ATLAS AML.T0040 (ML Inference API Access).
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and ('Request URL' like '*/v1/chat*' or 'Request URL' like '*/v1/completions*' or 'Request URL' like '*/v1/embeddings*' or 'Request URL' like '*/llm/*' or 'Request URL' like '*/ai/*' or 'Request URL' like '*/generate*' or 'Request URL' like '*/predict*' or 'Request URL' like '*/invoke*') and ('Response Code' = 401 or 'Response Code' = 403 or 'Response Code' = 429) | stats count as RejectedCalls, distinctcount('Request URL') as Routes by 'Client IP', 'Service Name', 'Response Code' | sort -RejectedCalls
falsepositives: Misconfigured client retrying with an expired token
Rate-limit tuning windows where legitimate clients briefly receive 429
